products.title: Hashtag Finder
products.tagline: AI Hashtag Discovery for Social Media Reach
products.description: Small accounts plateau because they reuse the same five hashtags forever — their posts circulate among existing followers and never reach new ones. Hashtag Finder analyzes the post (or pasted caption) and surfaces the highest-leverage hashtags right now across Facebook, TikTok, and Instagram, blending volume, trend velocity, and the account's actual niche. Posts surface in searches and feeds beyond the existing audience.
products.subject_line: Your last 10 posts used the same 5 hashtags. Here's what's working now.
before_bullets: No data on what tags actually work
Trends shift weekly, owners don't notice
products.why_works: Most small accounts plateau on hashtags they picked once. Surfacing what's working *this week* is a cheap, repeatable win.

products.title: Promo Page Generator
products.tagline: One-Click Landing Pages for Local Business Promotions
products.description: Local businesses constantly run promotions — '50% off this weekend', 'buy one get one free', 'happy hour ends Sunday' — and post them as Facebook captions that disappear into the feed. Promo Page Generator takes the title, details, and duration; AI generates a ready-to-use landing page with countdown, claim CTA, and share-ready Open Graph cards for Facebook and Instagram. No developer, no template wrestling — recurring revenue per promo.
products.subject_line: Launch your weekend promo with one click — landing page included.
wins: Promos are constant — built-in repeat usage
FB/IG share-ready out of the box
Cheap to run, fast to demo
before_bullets: Promo dies in the feed within hours
No landing page = no claim tracking
Captions look amateur in the inbox
products.why_works: Owners run promos constantly — they just don't have a developer. One-click landing pages turn every promo into a repeat purchase.

products.title: AI Social Content Generator
products.tagline: Daily Caption + Hashtag + Content Plan for SMBs
products.description: SMB owners freeze at 'what should I post today?' and skip the day. AI Social Content Generator scrapes their business details (services, location, recent reviews, current promos) and produces a weekly content plan: daily captions, hashtag sets, image and video prompts, and a posting calendar tailored for Instagram and TikTok. Owner executes — distinct from John's done-for-you Faceless Video Studio, which ships finished videos.
products.subject_line: Tomorrow's posts, written. Hashtags, picked. Just hit publish.
wins: Removes the 'what should I post?' blocker
Daily content plan from one scrape
Captions + hashtags + visuals in one tool
before_bullets: Brand voice drifts post to post
products.why_works: The blocker isn't time, it's deciding what to post. Hand owners a plan and they ship — every day.
